text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I drop by the pool to observe<n>training,
when...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah! I'll show you that I'm just<n>as fast in
the water too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I can't sit idly by as they mess<n>around near the
pool, so I decide to<n>speak up. But before I do...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Turbo! Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Remember, you must make sure to<n>warm up
properly before you swim.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine! I can go from zero to ahundred without any prep!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If I may, jumping straight into the pool<n>will cause
your body temperature to<n>plummet rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Doing some warm-ups will get your<n>blood
flowing and wake up your<n>joints and muscles,
vastly improving<n>your physica—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: O-okay, got it. I'll get warmed up first!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, me too! One, two! Three, four!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After warming up, the three of them<n>line up next
to the pool...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So... what kind of training exercises<n>are we doing
today?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I have two plans in mind.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
One will improve cardiopulmonary<n>function to help
you stay in front. It<n>does this through
long-distance<n>swimming and practicing breathing
techniques when in streamline form.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The other focuses on kicks to<n>enhance your leg
strength, which is<n>crucial for catching up to
opponents.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: So, which would you prefer?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, whatever keeps me in<n>front is the way
to go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'd kinda like to focus on the closer<n>myself. I
wanna work on my<n>sprinting!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm, we'll need a tie-breaker...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ah, excuse me. You there. May I have<n>your
opinion on something?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Which of the training plans do you<n>think they
should do today?
choice_data_list: Work on your heart and lungs to lead the pack!

Build up those legs to end races on a strong
finish!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yay! That's exactly what I wanted!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Okay, get into your streamline position<n>and hold it
underwater.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Not really sure what that means, but<n>I'll try to
hold my breath as long as I<n>can!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get my best time yet!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! She really set a new<n>record!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, it doesn't seem like she's<n>actually going to
surface.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: TURBO?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: H-huh? My head is all spinny-spinny.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: ...But, but! I got a new all-time record!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That is true, yes. This may have been<n>worth it,
after all.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But you must not push yourself like<n>that! Your
health is not worth risking<n>for any record!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That concludes today's training. Just<n>to be safe,
please make your way to<n>the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! That's what I'm talking<n>about!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Watch and learn! Ikuno's training<n>plan is totally
gonna take me to the<n>next level!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hold on there, Tannhauser. Don't<n>dive in with
such momentum, or<n>else—!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: SPLASH!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: TANNHAUSER?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser bobs in the pool as the<n>water around
her begins to turn red...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, whoopsie. I bonked my face<n>and got a
nosebleed...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. In that case, we'll have to call<n>it a day on
swim training.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I hoped to be your support today, but<n>it seems
the nurse will have to<n>assume that role.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I'll help you too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's very kind of you, Turbo. Now,<n>let's go to
the infirmary!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am.
